title: Dead-pointer cleanup — delete orphan templates + scrub .fabric/bootstrap/README.md references
description: Clean-slate removal of all dead references to the v1.x `.fabric/bootstrap/README.md` path (no longer exists in v2.0). Deletes 4 orphan template files (zero source refs verified), strips dead special-case branches in agents-meta.ts, removes unused bootstrapTargetPath field from resolver.ts, updates user-visible i18n strings, and scrubs docs. Coordinates with TASK-03 marker rename so all touch points land in one cohesive cleanup.

files.change: DELETE — orphan template (zero refs from packages/cli/src/), content replaced by BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL in TASK-01
DELETE — orphan template (zero refs), replaced by Codex managed block from TASK-03
DELETE — orphan template (zero refs), replaced by writeCursorBootstrapManagedBlock in TASK-03
DELETE — orphan template (zero refs), contains dead `.fabric/bootstrap/README.md` pointer at L18, replaced by canonical in TASK-01

files.target: L105, L122, L135, L148 bootstrapTargetPath fields
files.change: Remove the `bootstrapTargetPath: '.fabric/bootstrap/README.md'` field from all four DetectedClientSupport objects (ClaudeCodeCLI, ClaudeCodeDesktop, Cursor, CodexCLI). Update DetectedClientSupport type if defined to drop the property. Verify via grep that no consumer reads bootstrapTargetPath.

Remove the `|| normalized === '.fabric/bootstrap/README.md'` clauses (or whichever pattern they use) from the special-case branches. Keep the 'AGENTS.md' → 'bootstrap' / L0 mapping intact (rc.19 root AGENTS.md still gets stable_id='bootstrap' as it's now the Codex thin shell). After removal: only 'AGENTS.md' triggers the bootstrap stable_id path.
Remove or update test cases that exercise the deleted '.fabric/bootstrap/README.md' → 'bootstrap' mapping. Verify remaining tests still cover 'AGENTS.md' → 'bootstrap' / L0.

Replace dead pointer text. Old: '...scaffold .fabric/bootstrap/README.md with TODO markers.' New: '...scaffold `.fabric/AGENTS.md` with the canonical Fabric bootstrap content.' Preserve the 'L0:' prefix and the 'fab install' verb.
Mirror en.ts change with zh-CN translation. Old: '...在 .fabric/bootstrap/README.md 生成带 TODO 标记的初始说明。' New: '...在 .fabric/AGENTS.md 生成 Fabric 引导规范内容。'
Replace .fabric/bootstrap/README.md references with .fabric/AGENTS.md. Update surrounding prose if it describes the old TODO-marker scaffold (no longer applicable — canonical is fixed text).
Replace .fabric/bootstrap/README.md with .fabric/AGENTS.md. Adjust user-facing guidance to describe the new managed-block fan-out behavior.

Update L17 dead pointer. DELETE L87-L89 registry rows for the three deleted orphan templates (templates/bootstrap/CLAUDE.md, codex-AGENTS-header.md, cursor-fabric-bootstrap.mdc). Add a single replacement row for `packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts` (the new single source).
Update AGENTS_MD_RESOURCE_URI dead-pointer reference. If the MCP resource handler is also stale, file a follow-up note (out of rc.19 scope per the exploration's topic_relation flag).

implementation: Grep verify zero consumers: `grep -r 'templates/bootstrap' packages/cli/src/` → expect empty
Grep verify zero consumers of bootstrapTargetPath: `grep -r 'bootstrapTargetPath' packages/cli/src/ packages/server/src/` → expect only the resolver.ts definitions (no readers)
Remove bootstrapTargetPath fields from resolver.ts (4 locations) and from the DetectedClientSupport type if present
Strip dead branches in agents-meta.ts (L223 + L249) and update agents-meta.test.ts to drop the obsolete test case
Update both i18n locale files (en.ts:375, zh-CN.ts:369)
Run typecheck + test suites — expect zero regressions (verifies the deletions were truly orphan)

Final grep sweep: `grep -r '\.fabric/bootstrap/README\.md' .` from monorepo root — expect ONLY hits in CHANGELOG.md (historical, preserved per memory `feedback_clean_slate.md` — changelog is append-only)

reference.pattern: Clean-slate refactor per memory `feedback_clean_slate.md` — while Fabric has zero users, prefer outright deletion over preservation/migration shims.
reference.examples: Recent rc.16/rc.17 cleanups dropped legacy install paths without compat shims — same playbook here.

criteria: Files DELETED: packages/cli/templates/bootstrap/CLAUDE.md, packages/cli/templates/bootstrap/codex-AGENTS-header.md, packages/cli/templates/bootstrap/cursor-fabric-bootstrap.mdc, packages/cli/templates/agents-md/AGENTS.md.template (all 4 confirmed via existsSync === false)
bootstrapTargetPath field removed from all 4 DetectedClientSupport objects in resolver.ts (grep returns 0 matches)
agents-meta.ts L223 + L249 dead branches removed; AGENTS.md → bootstrap/L0 mapping preserved
agents-meta.test.ts no longer tests the deleted '.fabric/bootstrap/README.md' mapping; remaining tests pass
en.ts:375 + zh-CN.ts:369 no longer contain '.fabric/bootstrap/README.md' substring
docs/SPEC_INTERNAL.md, docs/getting-started.md, docs/RULE_REGISTRY.md, docs/test-seed/server.md no longer contain the dead-pointer string
`grep -r '\.fabric/bootstrap' packages/ docs/` returns zero matches (excluding CHANGELOG.md)
`pnpm -r --if-present test` passes (no test depended on the deleted code)

rationale.chosen_approach: Outright deletion + scrub. No migration shim, no deprecation warnings — Fabric has zero published users and the memory `feedback_clean_slate.md` explicitly prefers clean-slate refactors.
alternatives_considered: Keep orphan files with deprecation notices (clutter; no upside given zero users)
Defer cleanup to a separate RC (slows momentum, leaves dead-pointer surface during rc.19 self-host)
decision_factors: Reduces grep noise for future maintainers
rationale.tradeoffs: Loss of historical reference vs cleaner codebase. Mitigated: git history preserves orphan content for archaeology.

manual_checks: Final grep sweep across packages/ and docs/ for '.fabric/bootstrap/README.md' — expect zero hits
Final grep sweep for 'templates/bootstrap/CLAUDE.md' substring — expect zero hits
success_metrics: Zero matches for the 4 deleted template filenames in source
Test suites pass without modification beyond the agents-meta.test.ts update

risks.description: Hidden consumer of bootstrapTargetPath discovered during deletion
risks.mitigation: Grep BEFORE deletion confirms zero readers; typecheck after deletion catches any I missed

risks.description: agents-meta.test.ts has more dead-mapping cases than just L179
risks.mitigation: Run the test file in isolation post-edit; fix any failing cases
